response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 15-year experience baseline with ~20 years of diverse software engineering, and demonstrates entrepreneurial capability through GISCollective. However, the Principal Engineer role requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI—this candidate's background is generalist full-stack development with only recent infrastructure-level exposure to AI tooling (MCP frameworks at re:cinq since April 2025). The missing Master's/PhD in AI, absence of AI-powered product portfolio, and lack of demonstrated strategic thinking on AI/cloud platform architecture are significant gaps for a Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with ~20 years of proven software engineering across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure)
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience through founding and maintaining GISCollective open-source geo-data platform since 2016
Recent AI infrastructure exposure through MCP framework and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq, showing current engagement with AI technologies
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI-related field; AI expertise limited to recent infrastructure tooling work rather than deep ML/AI product expertise required for principal-level role
Career progression shows generalist full-stack web development focus rather than specialized infrastructure, AI/ML, or platform architecture expertise needed for strategic role
No demonstrated track record of building AI-powered products or recognized AI expertise, contradicting the 'demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' preferred qualification

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated products gap
